name: Trinity Tea Party (Mika, Nagisa and Seia) (Blue Archive)
description:
Misono Mika is a student of Trinity Integrated Academy and the former leader of "Pater", one of the student unions that make up Trinity.

Kirifuji Nagisa is affiliated with Trinity General Academy, she is the leader of "Filius", one of the student union bodies that make up Trinity, and the host of the "Tea Party" student council.

Yurizono Seia is a member of Trinity Integrated Academy, Seia is the leader of the "Sanctus" student union, one of the Trinity factions.
creator: ZENity
